seoTitle: Pan Ban vs Panania — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Pan Ban and Panania. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Pan Ban vs Panania: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Pan Ban and Panania.
heading: Pan Ban vs Panania — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Pan Ban, New South Wales and Panania, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Pan Ban has a lower overall climate risk score (41/100) compared to Panania (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Pan Ban or Panania safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Pan Ban has a flood risk score of 45/100, while Panania scores 38/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Pan Ban scores 50/100 for bushfire risk. Panania scores 59/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Pan Ban or Panania?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Pan Ban has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.73% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
